```{=html}
<!-- recode_values() - island recoding with values -->
<script>
window.RV_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '4750'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000']
];
window.RV_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which value
// Value 1: "Biscoe" (row 0, 3)
// Value 2: "Dream" (row 1)
// Value 3: "Torgersen" (row 2)
window.RV_MATCHES = [
  [true, false, false, true],    // Biscoe
  [false, true, false, false],   // Dream
  [false, false, true, false]    // Torgersen
];
window.RV_LABELS = ['Southwest', 'Northwest', 'Northwest'];
window.RV_VALUE_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#4a86c5', '#9b59b6'];
</script>
```

::: {.rv-stage-wrap}
<div id="rv-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .rv-frag id="rv-tildes"}
[]{.fragment .rv-frag id="rv-val-1"}
[]{.fragment .rv-frag id="rv-val-2"}
[]{.fragment .rv-frag id="rv-val-3"}
[]{.fragment .rv-frag id="rv-result"}
[]{.fragment .rv-frag id="rv-highlight-new"}
